title: poa × alexandrae
intro: Poa × alexandrae, also known as Alexandra's meadow-grass or New Zealand meadow-grass, is a hybrid grass species native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Poa × alexandrae are attributed to its ability to reduce stress, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Poa × alexandrae can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in topical applications such as creams and ointments.
